title: Baby Tummy time mat,Tummy time Water mat, Baby Toys 3-36 Months, Fun Early Development Activity Play Center for Newborn,Inkfish-Blue,70x50cm.
features: 【High Quality and Safe for Baby 】:Tummy time water play mat is exclusively made of premium environmental BPA-free HEAVY DUTY PVC materials,quite durable ,Safe to babies health.Thicken material to keep the mat sturdy,can stand heavy high strength of extrusion and will not leak air or water.

【Best Baby Toys】: Every babies need exercise! They need to stretch and move those little arms and legs, and explore what their bodies can do! Enhance your baby’s motor, sensory, and cognitive skills with this fun, vibrant mat!Your infant baby would be fascinated by the bright sea world graph and cute floating toys in the water. It develops hand-eye coordination while having fun and is great for baby’s brain development.

【Helps Baby Develop】:Tummy time play mat helps strengthen baby’s leg and arm muscles to prepare to crawl. Aside from preventing a flat head, this sensory baby mat can also delight brain development and enhancing hand-eye coordination

【EASY TO USE & PACK】:Set the baby water mat by simply inflate the outer ring and fill the interior part with water! After use it, you can just empty the mat, fold it or roll it up, and pack it into your purse or suitcase! It would also be a great gift for baby shower

【Warranty & Guaranteed】:We offer fully refund and replacement service for water leak problem and any other quality problem. Your business with us comes with our no-risk, no-questions asked Money-Back Guarantee, and Top-Rated Customer Service.
description: Feature: The perfect play mat activity. "play mat helps your baby build strength in his back, legs, arms and neck," preparing him/her to be ready to explore the world on their own Enables learning about cause and effect, as the baby presses and moves the fish around from place to place Lots of visual colors & movement which creates fun and excitement Great for sensory stimulation, motor skills, cognitive abilities, and social skills 100% Safety with BPA free The Baby play mat is BPA free and No-Toxis tested by lab. The inflatable water mat does have a smell, but it's just the smell of plastic. Like a bouncy ball or any other plastic item that is blown up with air. It's not terrible. Promoting baby's sensory developement Babies love moving the foam toys around in the baby water mat. The background and pictures are really energetic and well designed. baby mat is tough for babies as they hates being on their stomach. But this baby play mat held their attention for several minutes. Continue to use inflatable water mat several times a day for short intervals so they can build their upper body strength and all that good stuff. For ages 3 months & up. Package Contents: 1x Inflatable Baby Water Mat .
